title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three rules for successfully building with Claude Code and presents six moves for leading an AI team. The content frames these as principles derived from Y Combinator's CEO and offers a four-question test framework before starting projects.
